title: GNDU Notification 2026 - Walk-in interview for 02 Project Assistant Posts
description: The Guru Nanak Dev University (GNDU) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 02 Project Assistant Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their M.Sc. and M.E./M. Tech can apply for the GNDU Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can attend the walk-in interview. Here we have mentioned the educational details, age limit, selection process, app...
